name: Twnkl Gft 2: A Lust For Blood
short_description: It's Christmas! Pelt the humans with gifts! Quickly!!!
detailed_description:
After a millennium of stagnation, Humanity fled to the stars in a bid to leave their past behind, but they're about to learn that tradition is what you make of it...

This holiday season, a metallic hoof reaches down from the depths of space, and good tidings it brings!

Dodge distractions! Launch gifts! Keep moving! Out of time? Onto the next planet!! It's a bit of a laugh really, but that won't stop you taking it deadly seriously, right? Do a good enough job and you'll have earned a little treat tonight...maybe a real test of your marksmanship.

  • 16 Tiny planets to Christmas your way through!

  • 4 Hidden locations

  • Redeem your coins at the Christmas Shop! Spruce up your apartment menu!

  • Engage in small talk with the cashier!

  • Three endings to discover
